Hensley In Support Of Motion; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BLOOD SWEAT & TEARS CONSTRUCTION INC., DBA BURPEE'S PLUMBING, ROOTER & SEWER's Motion: To Dismiss Plaintiff'S/Cross Defendant'S Complaint, To Strike Plaintiff'S/Cross Defendant'S Response To Cross Complaint, And For Entry Of Default On Cross Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of defendant-cross complainant Blood Sweat & Tears Construction Inc. to dismiss the complaint of plaintiff-cross defendant Excel Hotel Services, Inc.; to strike Excel's Answer to Blood Sweat & Tears's cross complaint, and to enter default against Excel on Blood Sweat & Tears's cross complaint is granted in part and denied in part. On December 20, 2024, the court continued the motion to permit corporate entity Excel to retain counsel. Excel has not opposed the motion as of the continued hearing date of February 4. Excel's complaint is dismissed and Excel's answer is stricken. The court denies the motion insofar as it seeks entry of default against Excel. Default and default judgment must be pursued consistent with SFLR, rule 6.6.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
